lessons.title: My Mother and Father
lessons.topic: Core family and sounds of U and V

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: Who usually bakes cookies in the video?
questions.hint: She loves to make sweet treats.

questions.question_text: Who takes the family dog for a walk in the video?
questions.hint: He enjoys walking with the dog in the park.

questions.question_text: Who is seen playing the violin in the video?
questions.hint: She loves making music with strings.

steps.title: Family Day
steps.text: This is my mother. She has a yellow umbrella. My father drives a big van. At home, we laugh together.

questions.question: What color is the mother's umbrella?

steps.explanation: Use 'I have a' to show something you own.

steps.audio_text: Hello! This is my mother. We are going on a trip in our big van. We always pack our yellow umbrella.

questions.question: Who is going on a trip with the speaker?

questions.question_text: This is my ___. (Fill in the blank)
What goes 'vroom vroom'? (Vocabulary question)
True or False: An umbrella can be blue.
Who is in 'My Mother and Father'?
Which word starts with 'V'? (Sounds question)

lessons.title: Brother and Sister
lessons.topic: Siblings and sounds of W and X

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: Who is drawing in the video?
questions.hint: Look for a girl with a pencil and paper.

questions.question_text: What color is the father's shirt?
questions.hint: It's the same color as the sky on a clear day.

questions.question_text: What sound does the word 'waving' start with?
questions.hint: It's the same sound as in 'water'.

steps.title: Our Family Day
steps.text: This is my brother. My brother has a big box. My sister is here. She is looking at her watch. We are playing together!

questions.question: Who is looking at a watch?

steps.explanation: Use this to show your family.

steps.audio_text: This is my brother. He loves his blue watch and keeps it in a green box. My sister thinks it's very cool.

questions.question: What color is the brother's watch?
Where does the brother keep his watch?

questions.question_text: I have a ___ watch. (Grammar question)
Which word begins with 'W'? (Vocabulary question)
True or False: The story is about a sister and her toy.
What does the sister think is cool? (Reading comprehension question)

lessons.title: Grandpa and Baby
lessons.topic: Extended family and sounds of Y and Z

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: What color is Baby's favorite toy? ✨
questions.hint: It's the color of the sun.

questions.question_text: What sound does Grandpa love to imitate? 💬
What food does Baby enjoy at breakfast? 🍒
questions.hint: It's creamy and starts with Y.

steps.title: Family Fun Day
steps.text: This is my grandpa. He plays with a yo-yo. My grandma gives me a zebra toy. The baby laughs. We all have fun!

steps.explanation: Use this to talk about family.

steps.audio_text: This is my grandpa. He plays with a yo-yo. My grandma has a book about zebras. We have fun together!

questions.question_text: Who is the oldest in the family? (Vocabulary question)
My ___ is happy. Choose the correct family word. (Grammar question)
True or False: A zebra is in grandma's book. (Reading comprehension question)
What toy does grandpa have? (Reading comprehension question)

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: Which animal in the video can swing from trees and likes bananas?
questions.hint: This animal is very playful and has a long tail.

questions.question_text: What color is the sky when the sun is shining brightly?
questions.hint: It's the color you see when there are no clouds during the day.

questions.question_text: Which family member is usually the oldest?
questions.hint: This person can be a grandpa or grandma.

steps.title: Lily's Family Day
steps.text: Hello! I am Lily. This is my mother and father. I have a big brother. My grandma is here. We have a blue car. I am excited!

steps.audio_text: This is our garden. I have a small orange cat. My brother is playing with his yellow ball.

questions.question: What is my brother playing with?

steps.expected_text: this is my mother and this is my father

questions.question_text: This is my ___. (Fill in the blank about family member)
Which emoji shows 'dog'? (Vocabulary question)
True or False: A red apple can be green.
What color is the sun in the sky? (Reading comprehension)
My brother is playing with ___ ball. (Grammar question)
